requirements.title: MVP-β-08 SSO OIDC+SAML production-ready vs Keycloak/Okta/Entra/Google (IDP matrix test)
requirements.evidence: OIDC presets (Keycloak/Auth0/Okta), SAML 2.0 ACS with XML signature verification, WebAuthn (AUTH-001, INT-001/002, Iter32 tests).
requirements.gap: No live IDP-matrix integration test across all four IdPs (live IdP wiring is operator-gated per traceability); Entra/Google not separately verified.

requirements.title: MVP-β-09 Provider fallback impossible from PHI-approved to non-approved (property-based test)
requirements.evidence: AiGateway.EnforcePhiPolicy + EfProviderRouter respect ProviderComplianceClass (PROV-004, AiGatewayPolicyTests.cs).
requirements.gap: Enforcement exists but verified by example tests, not property-based as the criterion specifies.

requirements.title: MVP-β-10 Voice dictation (whisper.cpp) WER≤12% on radiology corpus (English)
requirements.evidence: desktop/whisper.md documents how to wire whisper.cpp as a Tauri sidecar; DictateButton.tsx subscribes to a transcript event. No bundled binary, no corpus, no WER benchmark.
requirements.gap: Bundle whisper.cpp, add a radiology test corpus and an automated WER≤12% benchmark.

requirements.title: MVP-β-11 Peer review queue, blinded review, concordance scoring operational
requirements.evidence: No PeerReview entity/controller/UI or concordance scoring found in backend/frontend.
requirements.gap: Build the peer-review workflow (queue, blinding, concordance) with service + UI tests.

requirements.title: MVP-β-12 Teaching files export RSNA MIRC-compatible packages
requirements.evidence: No MIRC/teaching-file export in code (MIRC appears only in PRD/docs).
requirements.gap: Implement MIRC-compatible teaching-file packaging + schema validator.

requirements.title: MVP-β-13 RECIST 1.1 lesion tracking (target/non-target sums, response categories, timeline)
requirements.evidence: MeasurementExtractionService exists (generic measurement extraction) but no RECIST 1.1 logic, response categories, or longitudinal timeline; RECIST appears only in PRD.
requirements.gap: Implement RECIST 1.1 tracking with numerical regression tests against published examples.

requirements.title: GA-01 SCIM 2.0 provisioning end-to-end with ≥3 IDPs (integration matrix)
requirements.evidence: Full SCIM 2.0 Users+Groups (ScimController.cs, AUTH-005, Iteration14Tests) with group→role projection and audit.
requirements.gap: No multi-IdP integration matrix proving end-to-end provisioning against ≥3 real IdPs.

requirements.title: GA-02 SIEM export supports CEF, LEEF, OCSF, and S3 NDJSON (format conformance)
requirements.evidence: CEF + NDJSON (JSON) export implemented (INT-010); Splunk/Sentinel/Elastic/Syslog sinks.
requirements.gap: LEEF, OCSF, and S3 NDJSON formats not implemented; no format-conformance test suite for all four.

requirements.title: GA-03 Customer-managed keys (KMS/HSM/Vault Transit) verifiable via key-id metadata (key-rotation test)
requirements.evidence: AwsKmsProvider/AzureKeyVaultKmsProvider/GcpKmsProvider + env:/local: schemes, AesGcmColumnEncryptor, POST /api/tenant/settings/kms/verify wrap+unwrap, CmkLastVerifiedAt (SEC-003); KmsAdapterTests + nightly live KMS round-trip.
requirements.gap: HSM and HashiCorp Vault Transit not implemented; key-id stamped on artifacts but a full key-rotation test across providers is partial.

requirements.title: GA-04 On-prem deploy runbook 0→working tenant ≤4h on documented hardware (install drill)
requirements.evidence: deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml, Caddyfile.prod, deploy/vps/ manifests, deployment docs (PROGRESS iter-41/42 live VPS deploy).
requirements.gap: No documented hardware reference or a timed ≤4h zero-to-tenant install-drill record.

requirements.title: GA-05 AI governance dashboard (model inventory, prompt/rulebook versions, drift, PHI posture, audit completeness)
requirements.evidence: frontend/app/admin/governance/page.tsx (GOV-001) aggregates audit-chain integrity, usage/AI KPIs, plan entitlements, draft prompt overrides, templates pending, rulebook lineage; governanceDashboard.test.tsx; ModelDriftDetectionService exists.
requirements.gap: Does not clearly surface a full model inventory and drift alerts + PHI-routing posture in one dashboard; partial coverage of the required panels.

requirements.title: GA-06 Model-eval harness vs any registered provider/model → published SIGNED evaluation report (Eval CLI + signed artifact)
requirements.evidence: CLI `eval` command (Program.cs) runs golden cases against a deployed provider and prints pass/total; frontend admin/model-eval/page.tsx compares providers via sandbox-compare.
requirements.gap: Produces console pass-rate only — no published, SIGNED evaluation report artifact.

requirements.title: GA-07 Rulebook approval auditable, signed, with evidence packs for medical-director sign-off
requirements.evidence: Rulebook approval workflow + audit (RB-003, RulebookGovernanceTests); PromptOverride approval gated to MedicalDirector; validation packs lifecycle (VPK-001).
requirements.gap: Approvals are audited but not cryptographically SIGNED and no bundled 'evidence pack' for sign-off.

requirements.title: GA-08 Desktop/daemon centrally manageable via MDM config files + fleet-config API (fleet test)
requirements.evidence: Device pairing/fingerprint exists (DESK-008) but no MDM-friendly config files and no fleet-config API endpoint or fleet test.
requirements.gap: Add fleet configuration API + MDM-distributable config and a fleet-management test.

requirements.title: GA-09 Multilingual UI (8 langs) + report generation in English plus ≥2 more (i18n test suite)
requirements.evidence: next-intl wired with en/es/de/fr/pt/hi bundles (INTL-001, Iter35LocaleTests); TenantSettings.Locale/User.PreferredLocale; locale switcher.
requirements.gap: Only 6 of the 8 required UI locales (missing Arabic + Japanese + simplified Chinese; pt/hi present but zh/ar/ja absent); report-generation multilingual not demonstrated for ≥2 non-English languages.

requirements.title: GA-10 Federated learning rounds complete on FL test rig without leaking raw PHI (privacy audit)
requirements.evidence: No federated-learning code or test rig (federated appears only in PRD/architecture docs).
requirements.gap: Implement an FL test rig + privacy-audit script; entirely absent.

requirements.title: GA-11 Plugin marketplace: ≥5 reference plugins, signature verification, conformance suite
requirements.evidence: MarketplaceController + MarketplaceSubmissionTests; MCP/plugin Ed25519 manifest signature verification (PluginManifestSignatureTests, PacsPluginsVerifierTests); mcp-connectors/* with .sig files.
requirements.gap: Signature verification present; need ≥5 shipped reference plugins and a plugin conformance runner (ties to §28.4).

requirements.title: GA-12 Air-gapped deploy: offline install, no egress, model bundles + SBOM mirror (network-blackhole test)
requirements.evidence: Air-gap only mentioned in PRD/architecture docs; no offline-install procedure, model-bundle mirror, SBOM mirror, or network-blackhole test.
requirements.gap: Document and test a fully offline install including bundled models and SBOM mirror.

requirements.title: GA-13 SOC2 Type II / ISO 27001 in progress or complete; HITRUST i1 readiness complete
requirements.evidence: Regulatory docs exist (docs/09-regulatory/*: ISO 14971, IEC 62304, EU-AIAct/GDPR, PMS, BAA) but these are external-audit/process items, not code.
requirements.gap: Process/audit evidence item — no in-repo software deliverable; track externally.

requirements.title: GA-14 EU AI Act technical documentation pack (risk mgmt, data governance, transparency, oversight, accuracy, robustness, cybersecurity)
requirements.evidence: docs/09-regulatory/eu-aiact-gdpr-profile.md + iso-14971-risk-register.md + clinical-evaluation-plan.md + samd-classification.md provide substantial coverage.
requirements.gap: Not assembled as a single EU AI Act technical-documentation pack covering all seven named pillars explicitly; scattered across docs.

requirements.title: GA-15 Conformance program publishes signed reports for ≥3 external authors/vendors (conformance registry)
requirements.evidence: No conformance registry or signed external conformance reports (depends on missing §28.4 conformance suite).
requirements.gap: Build the conformance program/registry and publish ≥3 signed external reports.

requirements.title: LTS-01 ≥24 months security backports + bug-fix releases committed in writing (public LTS policy)
requirements.evidence: SECURITY.md supported-versions table + references VERSIONING.md; states 12-month support post-1.0.
requirements.gap: Stated support is 12 months, not the ≥24-month LTS commitment; no dedicated public LTS policy.

requirements.title: LTS-02 Automated N→N+2 upgrade path via `radiopad migrate` (migration suite)
requirements.evidence: CLI command list (Program.cs) has no `migrate` command; EF migrations exist for the DB but there is no `radiopad migrate` N→N+2 tool or migration test suite.
requirements.gap: Implement a `radiopad migrate` command with an automated N→N+2 migration test suite.

requirements.title: LTS-03 Backward-compatible API guarantees enforced via contract tests on every PR (contract test gate)
requirements.evidence: OpenAPI is structurally lint-validated, but no consumer/provider contract tests (e.g. Pact) or API-breaking-change gate per PR.
requirements.gap: Add contract tests / OpenAPI breaking-change detection as a required PR check.

requirements.title: LTS-04 Reproducible builds verified by ≥2 independent build farms (reproducible-build attestation)
requirements.evidence: No reproducible-build configuration, SLSA provenance, or attestation in workflows; .gitattributes normalizes EOL but that is not build reproducibility.
requirements.gap: Add reproducible-build flags + provenance attestation and a second independent build verification.

area: PRD v2 §14.16–14.18 — Worklist & Workflow Optimization, Comparison & Longitudinal Tracking, Evidence & Citation Module
summary: Of the 23 discrete requirements across the three sections, this audit finds 0 fully implemented, 3 partial, and 20 missing. §14.16 Worklist (WL-001..010): there is NO worklist application feature, view, route, or nav entry anywhere in the locked stack. The only "worklist" code is FetchWorklistAsync inside three PACS vendor adapters (Sectra/Visage/Carestream, backend\RadioPad.Api\src\RadioPad.Infrastructure\Pacs\*Adapter.cs) — a vendor pull primitive with no UI, no UPS-RS/ORM-to-worklist ingestion, no filtering, smart-assign, fatigue, RVU, hanging-protocol hooks, pause/resume reads, multi-tenant switcher UI, or idle warnings. §14.17 Comparison/Longitudinal: a genuine prior-report auto-link + section diff DOES exist (ReportsController.ComparePrior/Prior at backend\...\Controllers\ReportsController.cs:341 & :647; frontend\app\reports\[id]\PriorComparePanel.tsx; frontend\lib\textDiff.ts LCS diff), satisfying COMP-001 and COMP-002 partially, but there is NO RECIST/iRECIST/Lugano/mRECIST/PERCIST/Cheson tracker, NO cross-study lesion table, NO trend chart, NO stable/increased/decreased auto-suggest language, and NO cross-modality correlation. §14.18 Evidence & Citation: entirely absent — no PubMed lookup, ACR Appropriateness, society-guideline library, citation insertion, per-tenant evidence rules, or provenance trail (the RadsService at backend\...\Services\RadsService.cs is a RADS scoring-code lookup, NOT a citable guideline/evidence library). PROGRESS.md contains no claims for any of these section IDs, consistent with the code. CLAUDE.md stack-lock was honored in judgment: no requirement was downgraded merely for missing the PRD's named OSS libraries — the gaps are genuine functional absences on the locked stack. Existing measurement extraction (MeasurementExtractionService.cs) is regex finding/size capture only and is NOT wired into any longitudinal lesion tracker.

requirements.title: WL-001 — Read-only worklist view ingesting DICOMweb UPS-RS or HL7 ORM
requirements.evidence: No worklist view, route, or page exists (Glob for **/worklist/** = no files; frontend\components\shell\nav.config.tsx has no worklist nav item). The only 'worklist' code is FetchWorklistAsync on the PACS vendor adapters (IPacsVendorAdapter.cs:25; Sectra/Visage/Carestream adapters), which pull from a vendor GraphQL/REST endpoint — NOT a UPS-RS (DICOMweb worklist) or HL7 ORM ingestion path, and with no UI surface.
requirements.gap: Build a worklist domain model + ingestion from DICOMweb UPS-RS and/or HL7 ORM, a WorklistController, and a read-only worklist page rendered in AppShell with a nav entry. The vendor-adapter pull could feed it but cannot satisfy the UPS-RS/ORM clause as-is.

requirements.title: WL-002 — Filtering by modality, body part, priority, age, prior status, subspecialty
requirements.evidence: No worklist exists to filter. PacsWorklistQuery (IPacsVendorAdapter.cs:32) exposes only Modality/Status/ScheduledFrom/ScheduledTo/Limit on the vendor pull — no body part, priority, patient age, prior status, or subspecialty filtering, and it is not surfaced as a user-facing filterable list.
requirements.gap: Add a filterable worklist list (server query + UI filter controls) covering modality, body part, priority, age, prior status, and subspecialty. Depends on WL-001.

requirements.title: WL-003 — 'Smart assign' suggestion (subspecialty match, fatigue, fairness), informational only
requirements.evidence: No match for SmartAssign / smart-assign / assignment-suggestion anywhere in backend, frontend, cli, or desktop (grep across **/*.cs and frontend/**/*.{ts,tsx} returned nothing).
requirements.gap: Implement an assignment-suggestion service (subspecialty match + fatigue + fairness heuristics) returning informational suggestions, plus UI. Depends on WL-001/WL-002 and WL-004.

requirements.title: WL-004 — Reader load and fatigue heuristics (hours read, breaks suggested)
requirements.evidence: No reader-load/fatigue/hours-read tracking found (grep 'fatigue|reader.?load|read.?count' = no matches in app code; analytics page frontend\app\analytics\page.tsx covers product/governance KPIs only, no reader-load or RVU).
requirements.gap: Track per-reader read time/volume and compute fatigue/break heuristics; expose via API + UI. New feature.

requirements.title: WL-005 — RVU and procedure-mix analytics
requirements.evidence: No RVU or procedure-mix logic (grep 'RVU|procedure.?mix' across analytics page and all source = no matches). The analytics summary (frontend\app\analytics\page.tsx, PRD §18) reports AI usage/quality/governance KPIs, not RVU or procedure mix.
requirements.gap: Add RVU mapping per procedure code and procedure-mix aggregation to analytics; new data model + dashboard panel.

requirements.title: WL-006 — Prior-study auto-linker (HL7 + DICOM patient ID + accession-based)
requirements.evidence: Accession-based prior-REPORT linking exists: ReportsController.ComparePrior (backend\...\Controllers\ReportsController.cs:341) matches the most-recent prior by accession-number stem; Prior (:647) matches by body part. PACS adapters also offer FetchPriorAsync(accession) (IPacsVendorAdapter.cs:26). However the auto-link is accession-stem/body-part heuristic only — NOT DICOM Patient ID and NOT HL7-driven, and it links prior reports, not prior studies in a worklist context.
requirements.gap: Add patient-ID (MRN/DICOM PatientID) and HL7-based prior linking in addition to accession; the controller comment itself notes MRN matching is a TODO ('swap this for report.Study.PatientMrn when populated'). Surface in worklist/study context.

requirements.title: WL-007 — Hanging-protocol hooks for major viewers (OHIF, Weasis, Horos, Radiant, PACS APIs)
requirements.evidence: No hanging-protocol code for any viewer (grep 'hanging' = no app-code matches; no OHIF/Weasis/Horos/Radiant launch integration found).
requirements.gap: Implement deep-link/launch hooks (URL schemes or PACS APIs) to open studies in OHIF/Weasis/Horos/Radiant with a hanging protocol. New integration layer.

requirements.title: WL-008 — Pause/resume reads with state preserved across sessions and devices
requirements.evidence: There is a cross-device report-DRAFT store: frontend\lib\offlineDrafts.ts persists draft sections via Tauri secure store / localStorage and syncs to the API, and report drafts persist server-side (Reports table). This gives de-facto state preservation for an in-progress report. However there is NO explicit 'pause/resume a read' worklist concept (no read-state machine, no resume-where-left-off across devices tied to a worklist item).
requirements.gap: Introduce an explicit per-reader 'read in progress / paused / resumed' state on worklist items, persisted server-side and resumable cross-device. Depends on WL-001.

requirements.title: WL-009 — Multi-tenant worklist switcher for teleradiologists
requirements.evidence: Multi-tenant request scoping exists: api.ts activeTenant() reads localStorage 'radiopad.tenant' and sends X-RadioPad-Tenant header (frontend\lib\api.ts:61-99); backend resolves the active tenant per request (ReportsController ResolveContextAsync). But there is NO tenant SWITCHER UI (no tenant picker in Topbar/ProfileMenu; grep 'tenant.?switch|TenantSwitch' = no matches) and no per-tenant worklist to switch between.
requirements.gap: Add a tenant-membership list endpoint + a switcher control in the shell that re-scopes the worklist; depends on WL-001 for the worklist itself.

requirements.title: WL-010 — Configurable timeouts and idle-state warnings
requirements.evidence: Numerous backend HTTP/session timeouts exist, but no user-facing configurable idle timeout or idle-state warning tied to reading sessions (grep 'idle|inactivit' surfaces only network/CLI/auth timeouts, e.g. CliProviderRunner, AiGateway — none is an idle-warning UI or a tenant-configurable read timeout).
requirements.gap: Add a configurable idle timeout setting and a client idle-warning/auto-pause behavior for active reads. New feature.

requirements.title: COMP-001 — Auto-link prior reports for the same patient and similar modality
requirements.evidence: Implemented for prior reports: ReportsController.ComparePrior (backend\...\ReportsController.cs:341) auto-finds the most-recent prior report by accession-number stem; ReportsController.Prior (:647) finds the most-recent acknowledged prior for the same BODY PART. Frontend PriorComparePanel.tsx consumes both. Gap vs clause: matching is by accession stem or body part, NOT explicitly by patient identity, and 'similar modality' is not a matching criterion (Prior matches body part regardless of modality; ComparePrior ignores modality).
requirements.gap: Match priors by stable patient identity (MRN/PatientID) and add a similar-modality constraint/ranking. Moderate change to the two existing queries.

requirements.title: COMP-002 — Semantic diff of prior vs current findings
requirements.evidence: A section-level diff exists end to end: ComparePrior returns current vs prior section bodies; PriorComparePanel.tsx (frontend\app\reports\[id]\PriorComparePanel.tsx) renders a two-column per-section view marking sections changed/unchanged; frontend\lib\textDiff.ts provides an LCS line-by-line diff. This is a TEXTUAL/lexical diff, not a SEMANTIC one (no concept/finding-level NLP comparison; 'changed' is computed by string inequality of section bodies).
requirements.gap: Add semantic comparison (finding/concept-level: new/resolved/changed findings, measurement deltas) beyond line/section text diff. Could reuse MeasurementExtractionService for measurement deltas. Medium effort.

requirements.title: COMP-003 — RECIST 1.1 / iRECIST / Lugano / mRECIST / PERCIST / Cheson tracker
requirements.evidence: No oncology response-criteria tracker of any kind. Grep for RECIST|iRECIST|Lugano|mRECIST|PERCIST|Cheson across the entire repo returns matches ONLY in the PRD file itself — zero in backend/frontend/cli/desktop/rulebooks/templates.
requirements.gap: Build the full longitudinal response-criteria engine (target/non-target lesion selection, sum-of-diameters, response classification per criterion family) — the single largest gap in §14.17.

requirements.title: COMP-004 — Lesion table across studies (date, size, location, response classification)
requirements.evidence: No cross-study lesion table or lesion entity (grep 'Lesion' in *.cs hits only CheckIndexLesionLocalization in ReportValidator.cs, a single-report text rule). MeasurementExtractionService.cs extracts size/finding/location from one report's free text but does not persist lesions or track them across studies; no response-classification field exists.
requirements.gap: Add a persistent Lesion entity keyed to patient, captured per study (date/size/location), aggregated into a multi-study table with response classification. Depends on COMP-003 for classification.

requirements.title: COMP-005 — Auto-suggest 'stable / increased / decreased' language with thresholds
requirements.evidence: No interval-change language generation. Grep for stable|increased|decreased in clinical-suggestion context = no matches (only incidental substrings like 'stable across' in prompt instructions and 'increased' in unrelated code). No threshold configuration for size-change classification exists.
requirements.gap: Compare current vs prior measurements (MeasurementExtractionService is available) against configurable thresholds and emit suggested stable/increased/decreased phrasing (with .ai-mark per design lock). Medium effort; partially leverages existing extraction.

requirements.title: COMP-006 — Visualization: lesion trend chart per patient
requirements.evidence: No lesion trend chart or any per-lesion time-series visualization (no chart component for lesions; no lesion data to chart). Analytics page charts AI/governance KPIs only.
requirements.gap: Add a per-patient lesion size-over-time chart. Depends on COMP-004 lesion data existing first.

requirements.title: COMP-007 — Cross-modality comparison (e.g., CT lesion correlated to MR finding)
requirements.evidence: No cross-modality lesion correlation. The Prior endpoint matches by body part across modalities but does not correlate individual lesions/findings across CT vs MR; no correlation model exists.
requirements.gap: Implement lesion/finding correlation across modalities (spatial/anatomic matching). Depends on COMP-003/COMP-004. Lowest priority (P3).

requirements.title: EV-001 — One-click PubMed lookup with abstract preview
requirements.evidence: No PubMed integration anywhere (grep PubMed across all *.cs/*.ts/*.tsx = no matches outside the PRD).
requirements.gap: Add a PubMed (E-utilities) lookup service + UI panel with abstract preview, respecting AiGateway/provider egress policy if proxied. New feature.

requirements.title: EV-002 — ACR Appropriateness Criteria search (where licensed)
requirements.evidence: No ACR Appropriateness Criteria search (grep 'appropriateness' = no app-code matches). RadsService.cs is an ACR RADS scoring-code lookup (BI/LI/PI/TI-RADS categories) — explicitly NOT Appropriateness Criteria and not a search feature.
requirements.gap: Integrate or ingest ACR Appropriateness Criteria with a search UI, gated by licensing/feature flag. New feature.

requirements.title: EV-003 — Society guideline library (Fleischner, RSNA, ACR, ESR, ESUR, JBR, etc.)
requirements.evidence: No browsable/citable society guideline library. 'Fleischner' appears only as follow-up logic embedded in lung/liver rulebooks (rulebooks\*.yaml), and RADS systems exist as validation scoring (rulebooks\_terminology\rads.yaml via RadsService). There is no library data model, no guideline content store, and no UI to browse/search guidelines as evidence.
requirements.gap: Create a guideline library (content + metadata for Fleischner/RSNA/ACR/ESR/ESUR/JBR) with browse/search UI and link-out. New feature/data model.

requirements.title: EV-004 — Citation insertion as footnote-style references in report
requirements.evidence: No citation/footnote insertion in the report editor (grep Citation across *.cs/*.ts/*.tsx = no matches outside docs/PRD). The report editor (frontend\app\reports\[id]\ReportClient.tsx) has section bodies, AI rewrite, and prior-compare, but no reference/footnote model.
requirements.gap: Add a citation/reference data model on the report and an insert-as-footnote UI that emits numbered references. Depends on EV-001/EV-003 to source citations.

requirements.title: EV-005 — Per-tenant evidence library and rules ('only cite within these journals')
requirements.evidence: No per-tenant evidence library or citation policy (no evidence library exists at all; no tenant setting governing allowed journals/sources). TenantSettings carry PACS/provider config but nothing evidence-related.
requirements.gap: Add per-tenant evidence-source allow-lists and library scoping enforced at lookup time. Depends on EV-001/EV-003.

requirements.title: EV-006 — Provenance trail: which evidence informed which suggestion
requirements.evidence: No evidence-to-suggestion provenance linkage. The append-only audit log (IAuditLog) records AI actions but does not associate cited evidence with specific AI suggestions, and no evidence entity exists to reference. Grep 'Provenance' in code = no matches.
requirements.gap: Record, per AI suggestion, the evidence items that informed it, and expose the trail (likely via the existing audit log + a new linkage table). Depends on EV-001/EV-003/EV-004.
